package_manifest:
# AIL Package

name: ail.std.collections
version: 0.2.0
profile: Application
entry: spec.ail-spec.md
features: stdlib, types, functions, collection-transform, traces
imports: ../ail_std_core.ail compatible ^0.2 as Core
conformance: v0.2
schema-version: ail-core.schema.v0
safety-level: standard
target-support:
  ail-core.schema.v0: supported
requirements:
AIL-Requirements:
- The package ail.std.collections defines reusable collection and result types.
- The package defines Type Option<T> with variants Some(value: T) and None.
- The package defines Type Result<T,E> with variants Success(value: T) and Failure(error: E).
- The package defines Type List<T> with variants Empty and Items(values: T).
- The package defines Type Map<K,V> with variants Empty and Entries(key: K, value: V).
- The package defines Type Set<T> with variants Empty and Members(value: T).
- The package defines Function Option.map.
- Option.map needs option: Option<T> and mapper: Text.
- Option.map produces result: Option<U>.
- When Option.map runs, if the option is Some(value), the function calls mapper with value, returns Some(mapped value), and records a trace event named OptionMapEvaluated.
- When Option.map runs, if the option is None, the function returns None.
